fy1_fcf_consensus: 15.05B modeled from FY2026 FCF and FY2027 company FCF growth guide
company_guidance_metric: FY2027 non-GAAP diluted EPS guidance midpoint
current_multiple: 13.6x FY2027 non-GAAP EPS guide; 13.7x forward PE; 4.37x EV/Sales; 12.77x EV/FCF
historical_multiple_range: StockAnalysis ratio history shows forward P/E of 13.74 current and 16.77x/31.67x/30.40x/29.97x/55.99x for FY2026-FY2022; EV/FCF of 12.77 current and 14.18x/26.18x/28.51x/26.26x/44.07x for FY2026-FY2022; EV/Sales of 4.37 current and 4.92x/8.59x/7.77x/5.29x/8.79x for FY2026-FY2022. CompaniesMarketCap P/S and trailing P/E remain cross-checks.
peer_multiple_range: Broader peer current range in peer-valuation-table.csv: forward P/E roughly 10.8x-30.0x across ADBE/INTU/PEGA/CRM/SAP/MSFT/NOW/ORCL; EV/Sales roughly 3.28x-12.05x; EV/FCF roughly 10.13x-46.52x where meaningful, with ORCL n/a due negative FCF
implied_growth_duration: Market does not price CRM as a high-growth AI-agent compounder; FY2028 consensus revenue growth of 9.5% and MarketScreener FY2028 FCF forecast of $16.458B imply moderate cash-flow growth rather than a hypergrowth AI-agent reset
implied_margin_path: Company must hold non-GAAP operating margin around 34% while Agentforce/Data 360 support organic growth; FCF guide implies about 4%-5% FY2027 FCF growth, and MarketScreener FY2028 FCF forecast implies reacceleration to roughly 10% growth
implied_roic_path: ROIC from StockAnalysis is 11.07%; thesis needs evidence that AI/data reinvestment lifts durable ROIC rather than mainly funding buybacks/acquisitions
what_must_go_right: Agentforce/Data 360 ARR continues growing; AI usage converts to paid expansion and renewals; organic growth appears in 2H FY27; Informatica contribution is cleanly separated; margins and FCF stay durable after ASR/debt
what_is_already_priced: Profitable mid-teens EPS multiple, low-teens EV/FCF and sub-5x EV/Sales already price skepticism versus CRM's own 2022-2025 history and higher-quality or higher-growth peers, but still assume durable cash generation and no deterioration in core CRM demand
false_precision_warning: Consensus EPS source may mix non-GAAP definitions; FY1 FCF is modeled from company guidance rather than external consensus; FY2 FCF uses MarketScreener forecast/estimate and should be challenged for source definitions; historical ratios use StockAnalysis definitions and fiscal-year snapshots; share count and EPS are distorted by ASR final settlement.
downside_multiple: 10.8x ADBE-like forward PE or 10x downside PE on low FY2028 EPS scenario
downside_path: If Agentforce metrics do not bridge to organic growth, market can value CRM closer to mature software ex-growth despite current low relative multiple; ASR/debt and acquisition complexity could limit rerating
valuation_refresh_trigger: Q2 FY27 earnings or product metric update
source_notes: Current price/market cap/EV/current multiples and historical ratio series from StockAnalysis 2026-05-29/2026-05-27; FY2027/FY2028 revenue and EPS estimates from StockAnalysis/Finnhub; FY2028 FCF forecast from MarketScreener financial forecasts; guidance and FCF growth from Salesforce Q1 FY27 8-K Exhibit 99.1; FY2026 FCF from Salesforce FY2026 10-K; peer multiples from StockAnalysis and peer-valuation-table.csv; historical P/S and trailing P/E cross-checks from CompaniesMarketCap.
